comment: EXPERIMENTAL Track B (LWS) Databox component wiring (ADR-0024, DBX-09 scaffold).
These are the accepted Databox-owned component seams from DBX-04, wired here as fail-closed
placeholders. They are declared as named instances but are deliberately NOT yet spliced into
the core PermissionReader union or the ResourceStore middleware chain: DBX-14 splices the
composed authorizer, DBX-17 splices the append-only store. Nothing here widens access; every
placeholder refuses (throws NotImplemented) or grants nothing. Loading this preset does not
change any Track A representation (ADR-0024 §3, S-25).

@graph.comment: C3 authenticated-context extractor seam (DBX-12 replaces this fail-closed stub).
C5 tenant resolver seam (DBX-11 replaces this fail-closed stub).
C4 composed Databox authorizer seam — a narrow-never-broaden PermissionReader (DBX-14).
C10 opaque box-identifier generator seam (DBX-10 replaces this fail-closed stub).
C13 evidence ledger seam (DBX-18/DBX-19 replace this fail-closed stub).
C15 cursor / committed-event feed seam (DBX-21 replaces this fail-closed stub).
